Pictures The easiest way to save on a streaming service is often to pay for a year upfront, which HBO Max is currently making a lot cheaper. Through July 15, 2026, new and returning subscribers can get 28 percent off any of HBO Max’s yearly plans , bringing the ad-supported tier down to $78.99 ($31 off) per year, the Standard plan to $132.99 ($52 off) per year, and the Premium tier to $164.99 per year ($65 off). That’s up to 40 percent less than paying month to month. HBO Max Where to Buy: $109.99 $78.99 at HBO Max (annual, basic) $184.99 $132.99 at HBO Max (annual, standard) $229.99 $164.99 at HBO Max (annual, premium) All three plans include access to HBO Max’s extensive library of movies and TV shows, including films from Warner Bros. Pictures, DC Studios, A24, Studio Ghibli, and Turner Classic Movies. Subscribers can also stream recent Oscar winners and nominees like titles like Sinners , One Battle After Another, and Marty Supreme , alongside other HBO Max originals. On the TV side, you’ll also get access to popular series like The Pitt , Hacks , Euphoria , and Heated Rivalry , as well as longtime favorites such as Game of Thrones , Friends , and The Big Bang Theory .  The biggest differences come down to features. The ad-supported Basic plan lets you stream on up to two devices simultaneously, while the Standard plan lets you download up to 30 shows and movies for offline viewing. It also includes access to live sports from the likes of the MLB, U.S Soccer, college football, NHL, and more. The Premium tier lets you stream on up to four devices at once, supports 4K and Dolby Atmos, and increases offline downloads to 100 titles. ]]> David Pierce https://www.theverge.com/?p=952126 2026-06-18T15:15:03-04:00 2026-06-18T15:15:03-04:00 Snap's new smart glasses are probably the most impressive bit of face-computer technology we've seen. To name some examples, Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 are selling at their cheapest-ever price at Amazon and Walmart (though, the sale keeps playing peek-a-boo). Also, you can grab Ring’s latest battery-powered doorbell for $60 off and it includes a free Indoor Cam Plus with purchase. There are also enough early Apple deals and discounts on fantastic robovacs that we’ve spun up coverage ahead of next week. While the pre-Prime Day deals are looking good so far, you may not see the brands or products you’re looking for — hopefully, those deals will come later in June. Still, we’ve only included early deals that meet the criteria we hold for all our commerce coverage: they’re good products sold at attractive prices. We’ll update this post frequently ahead of Prime Day. Headphone / earbud deals Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 have been available at their lowest price to date for the past week or so. Originally $249, the noise-canceling, wireless earbuds are $179 at Amazon and Best Buy — no membership required. Walmart has a product page that lists $169 as a sale price, though it’s out of stock at the time of publication. The AirPods Pro 3 are the latest earbuds from Apple, packing better bass and active noise cancellation than their predecessor, plus the ability to do some light fitness tracking, among other niceties. Read our review . Bose QuietComfort Ultra headphones (second-gen) The latest over-ear, noise-canceling headphones from Bose offer longer battery life over ANC, plus lossless audio support via USB-C. Where to Buy: $449 $379 at Amazon $449 $379 at Best Buy The AirPods 4 on sale at Amazon , Walmart , and Best Buy for $99 ($30 off). Apple’s entry-level earbuds offer richer bass than previous generations along with a more robust IP54 rating for water and dust resistance. They match the latest AirPods Pro in voice call quality and work well with other Apple devices too, though they lack more advanced features like active noise cancellation. It might be a pro or con to some that this model simply rests in your ear. They don’t create a tight seal like the AirPods Pro. Smart home deals Govee Outdoor Lamp Post A 8-foot-tall, 2,000-lumen RGBIC smart outdoor lamp. The model has six color zones and dedicated white lighting. It features built-in motion and light sensors, works with Matter, is IP66 rated, and includes a long power cord for easy installation. Where to Buy: $259.99 $199.99 at Amazon $259.99 $199.99 at Govee The 8-piece and 14-piece Ring Alarm Pro home security systems have gotten big discounts ahead of Prime Day. The smaller kit of the two is $209.99 ($90 off) and includes a base station (it doubles as a eero 6 Wi-Fi router), a keypad, four contact sensors for doors or windows, a motion detector, and a range extender for the alarm. oldContent: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Ventra Health: Director, Client Success Anywhere in the World Customer Support Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote, U.S.A <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://ventrahealth.com">http://ventrahealth.com</a> </p> <div class="iCIMS_JobContent"> <h2 class="iCIMS_InfoMsg iCIMS_InfoField_Job"> About Us </h2> <div class="iCIMS_InfoMsg iCIMS_InfoMsg_Job"> <div class="iCIMS_Expandable_Container"> <div class="iCIMS_Expandable_Text"> <p><span>Ventra is a leading business solutions provider for facility-based physicians practicing anesthesia, emergency medicine, hospital medicine, pathology, and radiology. Focused on Revenue Cycle Management, Ventra partners with private practices, hospitals, health systems, and ambulatory surgery centers to deliver transparent and data-driven solutions that solve the most complex revenue and reimbursement issues, enabling clinicians to focus on providing outstanding care to their patients and communities.</span></p><p>&nbsp;</p><p><span><span><span><strong>Come Join Our Team!</strong></span></span></span></p><ul><li><span>As part of our robust Rewards &amp; Recognition program, this role is eligible for our Ventra performance-based incentive plan, because we believe great work deserves great rewards</span></li></ul><p><span><strong>Help Us Grow Our Dream Team — Join Us, Refer a Friend, and Earn a Referral Bonus!</strong></span></p> </div> </div> </div> <h2 class="iCIMS_InfoMsg iCIMS_InfoField_Job"> Job Summary </h2> <div class="iCIMS_InfoMsg iCIMS_InfoMsg_Job"> <div class="iCIMS_Expandable_Container"> <div class="iCIMS_Expandable_Text"> <ul><li><span>The Director, Client Success is responsible for overseeing and ensuring that Manager, Client Success maintain and develop a strong and long-term relationship with clients. This role will also include overseeing that relative operational and business services departments are on track for their clients and monitor and assess CRM Performance and activity on assigned clients, escalating issues/concerns, as appropriate.</span></li></ul> </div> </div> </div> <h2 class="iCIMS_InfoMsg iCIMS_InfoField_Job"> Essential Functions and Tasks </h2> <div class="iCIMS_InfoMsg iCIMS_InfoMsg_Job"> <div class="iCIMS_Expandable_Container"> <div class="iCIMS_Expandable_Text"> <ul><li><span>Monitor client performance and ensure Client Success standards are met</span></li><li><span>Utilize KPI tools and other analytics to manage and provide reporting and visibility on the performance and health of all internal and external clients</span></li><li><span>Mentor assigned Manager, Client Success in managing assigned clients to meet expectations, and exceed when opportunities arise</span></li><li><span>Establish and ensure client face-to-face meetings occur with CRM at a regular frequency</span></li><li><span>Analyze client results proactively to identify revenue cycle and client success related issues and work collaboratively with the Operations, Business Services teams, and leadership to implement solutions; ensure client concerns are escalated and resolved in a timely manner&nbsp;</span></li><li><span>Assist implementation team and Manager, Client Success on new client/expansions implementations&nbsp;</span></li><li><span>Compliance and adherence to applicable healthcare and security regulations and responsible for staff’s compliance and adherence</span></li><li><span>Responsible for the oversight, mentorship, and growth of assigned Client Success colleagues, where applicable&nbsp;</span></li><li><span>Compliance and adherence to applicable healthcare and security regulations and responsible for staff’s compliance and adherence</span></li><li><span>Performs special projects and other duties as assigned</span></li></ul> </div> </div> </div> <h2 class="iCIMS_InfoMsg iCIMS_InfoField_Job"> Education and Experience Requirements </h2> <div class="iCIMS_InfoMsg iCIMS_InfoMsg_Job"> <div class="iCIMS_Expandable_Container"> <div class="iCIMS_Expandable_Text"> <ul><li><span>High School Diploma or GED</span></li><li><span>Bachelor’s Degree in business, healthcare management, or related field preferred</span></li><li><span>At least five years (5) in healthcare, revenue cycle management, or related field</span></li></ul> </div> </div> </div> <h2 class="iCIMS_InfoMsg iCIMS_InfoField_Job"> Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities </h2> <div class="iCIMS_InfoMsg iCIMS_InfoMsg_Job"> <div class="iCIMS_Expandable_Container"> <div class="iCIMS_Expandable_Text"> <ul><li><span>Basic familiarity with medical billing and terminology</span></li><li><span>Ability to read, understand, and apply state/federal laws, regulations, and policies</span></li><li><span>Ability to communicate with diverse personalities in a tactful, mature, and professional manner</span></li><li><span>Ability to remain flexible and work within a collaborative and fast paced environment</span></li><li><span>Ability to deliver high quality service excellence with high attention to detail</span></li><li><span>Understand and comply with company policies and procedures</span></li><li><span>Proven strong leadership/management skills to manage, motivate, and set expectations with team members</span></li><li><span>Strong presentation development and delivery skills</span></li><li><span>Strong knowledge in RCM, accounting, and/or finance</span></li><li><span>Strong customer service and customer facing skills</span></li><li><span>Strong judgment skills and problem-solving skill</span></li><li><span>Strong oral, written, and interpersonal communication skills</span></li><li><span>Strong time management, organizational, and decision-making skills</span></li><li><span>Strong knowledge of Outlook and RCM software or equivalent workflow management software</span></li></ul> </div> </div> </div> <h2 class="iCIMS_InfoMsg iCIMS_InfoField_Job"> Compensation </h2> <div class="iCIMS_InfoMsg iCIMS_InfoMsg_Job"> <div class="iCIMS_Expandable_Container"> newContent: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Bottle Nexus: Affiliate & Brand Account Manager Anywhere in the World Customer Support Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5605/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Santee, California, United States <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://bottlenexus.com">http://bottlenexus.com</a> </p> <p>Bottle Nexus is quickly becoming one of the most important technology platforms in alcohol e-commerce.</p> <p>We power compliant direct-to-consumer sales, fulfillment, affiliate programs, marketplaces, and digital commerce solutions for alcohol brands across the United States. Today, Bottle Nexus supports more than <strong>500 leading alcohol brands and distilleries</strong>, along with a growing network of <strong>50+ influencers, affiliate shops, marketplaces, barrel-picking clubs, publishers, and strategic sales partners</strong>.</p> <p>As we continue scaling toward becoming one of the largest direct-to-consumer SaaS technology companies in the alcohol industry, we are expanding our team to help brands and partners unlock new sales channels, stronger customer relationships, and measurable e-commerce growth.</p> <p>Bottle Nexus sits at the intersection of alcohol, technology, compliance, fulfillment, SaaS, and digital marketing — and this role is a unique opportunity to help shape the future of how alcohol brands go to market.</p> <h3>About the Role</h3> <p>We are looking for an <strong>Affiliate &amp; Brand Account Manager</strong> to manage and grow relationships across both alcohol brand accounts and affiliate sales channels.</p> <p>This person will serve as a key point of contact for brand clients, affiliate partners, creators, marketplaces, barrel-picking clubs, and internal Bottle Nexus teams. The role combines account management, e-commerce growth, project coordination, affiliate marketing, Shopify support, and strategic partner development.</p> <p>The ideal candidate is highly organized, client-facing, entrepreneurial, and comfortable working in a fast-moving startup environment. You should be excited by the opportunity to manage a large book of accounts, build repeatable processes, coordinate cross-functional projects, and identify new ways for brands and affiliates to grow together.</p> <p>This is a <strong>remote position</strong>, but candidates <strong>must be based in the United States</strong>.</p> <p><strong>Requirements</strong></p> <h3>What You'll Do</h3> channels, marketplaces, and strategic programs. </li> <li> Build strong, trust-based relationships with brand partners and help them maximize the value of the Bottle Nexus platform. </li> </ul> <h3>Manage Affiliate &amp; Partner Channels</h3> <ul> <li> Manage and grow approximately <strong>30 affiliate channels</strong>, including influencers, content creators, publishers, barrel-picking workflows for affiliate onboarding, campaign execution, product selection, and performance tracking. </li> </ul> <h3>Coordinate Cross-Functional Projects</h3> <ul> <li> Work closely with product, oldContent: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Bottle Nexus: Affiliate & Brand Account Manager Anywhere in the World Customer Support Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5605/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Santee, California, United States <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://bottlenexus.com">http://bottlenexus.com</a> </p> <p>Bottle Nexus is quickly becoming one of the most important technology platforms in alcohol e-commerce.</p> <p>We power compliant direct-to-consumer sales, fulfillment, affiliate programs, marketplaces, and digital commerce solutions for alcohol brands across the United States. Today, Bottle Nexus supports more than <strong>500 leading alcohol brands and distilleries</strong>, along with a growing network of <strong>50+ influencers, affiliate shops, marketplaces, barrel-picking clubs, publishers, and strategic sales partners</strong>.</p> <p>As we continue scaling toward becoming one of the largest direct-to-consumer SaaS technology companies in the alcohol industry, we are expanding our team to help brands and partners unlock new sales channels, stronger customer relationships, and measurable e-commerce growth.</p> <p>Bottle Nexus sits at the intersection of alcohol, technology, compliance, fulfillment, SaaS, and digital marketing — and this role is a unique opportunity to help shape the future of how alcohol brands go to market.</p> <h3>About the Role</h3> <p>We are looking for an <strong>Affiliate &amp; Brand Account Manager</strong> to manage and grow relationships across both alcohol brand accounts and affiliate sales channels.</p> <p>This person will serve as a key point of contact for brand clients, affiliate partners, creators, marketplaces, barrel-picking clubs, and internal Bottle Nexus teams. The role combines account management, e-commerce growth, project coordination, affiliate marketing, Shopify support, and strategic partner development.</p> <p>The ideal candidate is highly organized, client-facing, entrepreneurial, and comfortable working in a fast-moving startup environment. You should be excited by the opportunity to manage a large book of accounts, build repeatable processes, coordinate cross-functional projects, and identify new ways for brands and affiliates to grow together.</p> <p>This is a <strong>remote position</strong>, but candidates <strong>must be based in the United States</strong>.</p> <p><strong>Requirements</strong></p> <h3>What You'll Do</h3> <h3>Manage Brand Accounts</h3> <ul> <li> Manage and grow approximately <strong>100 alcohol brand accounts</strong>. </li> <li> Serve as the main point of contact for assigned brands. </li> <li> Help brands drive e-commerce sales through Bottle Nexus buy buttons, product launches, promotions, and digital campaigns. </li> <li> Identify new revenue opportunities across brand websites, affiliate channels, marketplaces, and strategic programs. </li> <li> Build strong, trust-based relationships with brand partners and help them maximize the value of the Bottle Nexus platform. </li> </ul> Pictures, DC Studios, A24, Studio Ghibli, and Turner Classic Movies. Subscribers can also stream recent Oscar winners and nominees like titles like Sinners , One Battle After Another, and Marty Supreme , alongside other HBO Max originals. On the TV side, you’ll also get access to popular series like The Pitt , Hacks , Euphoria , and Heated Rivalry , as well as longtime favorites such as Game of Thrones , Friends , and The Big Bang Theory .  The biggest differences come down to features. To name some examples, Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 are selling at their cheapest-ever price at Amazon and Walmart (though, the sale keeps playing peek-a-boo). Also, you can grab Ring’s latest battery-powered doorbell for $60 off and it includes a free Indoor Cam Plus with purchase. There are also enough early Apple deals and discounts on fantastic robovacs that we’ve spun up coverage ahead of next week. While the pre-Prime Day deals are looking good so far, you may not see the brands or products you’re looking for — hopefully, those deals will come later in June. Still, we’ve only included early deals that meet the criteria we hold for all our commerce coverage: they’re good products sold at attractive prices. We’ll update this post frequently ahead of Prime Day. Headphone / earbud deals Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 have been available at their lowest price to date for the past week or so. Originally $249, the noise-canceling, wireless earbuds are $179 at Amazon and Best Buy — no membership required. Walmart has a product page that lists $169 as a sale price, though it’s out of stock at the time of publication. The AirPods Pro 3 are the latest earbuds from Apple, packing better bass and active noise cancellation than their predecessor, plus the ability to do some light fitness tracking, among other niceties. Read our review . Bose QuietComfort Ultra headphones (second-gen) The latest over-ear, noise-canceling headphones from Bose offer longer battery life over ANC, plus lossless audio support via USB-C. Where to Buy: $449 $379 at Amazon $449 $379 at Best Buy The AirPods 4 on sale at Amazon , Walmart , and Best Buy for $99 ($30 off). Apple’s entry-level earbuds offer richer bass than previous generations along with a more robust IP54 rating for water and dust resistance. They match the latest AirPods Pro in voice call quality and work well with other Apple devices too, though they lack more advanced features like active noise cancellation. It might be a pro or con to some that this model simply rests in you

oldContent: Remote OK Staff Product Manager Product Information Management HighLevel <p><strong>About Us</strong><br><br>HighLevel is an AI-powered business operating system that gives agencies, entrepreneurs and<br>SMBs the infrastructure to build, automate and scale. Today, HighLevel supports SMBs across<br>150+ countries, fueling community-driven growth rooted in real customer outcomes.<br><br>To date, businesses operating on HighLevel have generated over $7 billion in ecosystem value,<br>demonstrating the impact of shared infrastructure at scale. By centralizing conversations,<br>automation and intelligence into one system, we help businesses move faster, reduce complexity<br>and execute efficiently.<br><br>Behind the platform, HighLevel powers more than 4 billion API hits and 2.5 billion message events<br>daily. With 250 terabytes of distributed data, 250+ microservices and over 1 million domain names<br>supported, our architecture is built for performance, resilience and long-term scalability.<br><br><strong>Our People</strong><br><br>With over 2,000 team members across 10+ countries, HighLevel operates as a global, remote-first<br>organization built for speed and ownership. We value initiative, clarity and execution, creating space<br>for ambitious people to build systems that support millions of businesses worldwide. Here,<br>innovation thrives, ideas are celebrated and people come first, no matter where they call home.<br><br><strong>Our impact</strong><br><br>Every month, HighLevel enables more than 1.5 billion messages, 200 million leads and 20 million<br>conversations for the more than 1 million businesses we support. Behind those numbers are real<br>people building independence, expanding opportunity and creating measurable impact. Weâre<br>proud to be a part of that.<br><br><strong>Role Summary</strong><br><br>As the Staff Product Manager for Product Information Management, you will own the end-to-end<br>vision, strategy, and execution of HighLevelâs PIM â the foundational catalog layer that powers all<br>commerce activity across the platform. Your mission is to lead a structural overhaul of our existing<br>catalog infrastructure and build a world-class PIM that handles physical products, digital goods, and<br>services at scale. This is not just the backbone of our Commerce charter; it is shared infrastructure<br>consumed by multiple adjacent product teams, and the decisions you make here will have platform-<br>wide impact.<br><br><strong>What You'll Do</strong><br><br>â Own the PIM Vision: Define and drive the end-to-end roadmap for HighLevelâs Product<br>Information Management system â from Items, Variants, and Catalog Items to Price Lists,<br>Units of Measure, and multi-channel price resolution logic<br>â Lead the Catalog Overhaul: Architect the migration from our existing catalog foundation to a<br>robust, extensible PIM that supports the full breadth of HighLevelâs commerce use cases<br>across product types and selling channels<br>â Design for Multi-Team Consumption: Define clear API contracts and data models that<br>serve not just the Commerce team, but adjacent teams building service-based and<br>subscription-based product experiences â ensuring every consumer can reliably depend on<br>PIM as a platform<br>â Drive Cross-Functional Alignment: Lead structured collaboration with engineering, design,<br>and partner product teams to ensure PIM capabilities meet requirements across all consuming<br>surfaces, resolving conflicting priorities with clarity and conviction<br>â Shape Pricing Infrastructure: Own the strategy for multi-currency, rule-based, and channel-<br>aware pricing â ensuring the right price resolves correctly at every point of sale across all<br>storefronts and channels<br>â Champion the Merchant Experience: Translate complex catalog management requirements<br>into intuitive workflows that allow merchants across industries â from physical goods retailers<br>to service providers â to create, organize, and manage their offerings with ease<br>â Set the Platform Standard: Establish foundational patterns and best practices that make the<br>PIM a reliable, scalable service other teams can confidently build on, including documentation,<br>versioning, and deprecation protocols<br>â Influence the Broader Commerce Roadmap: Partner with peer PMs across the Commerce<br>team to ensure PIM investments are sequenced in a way that unlocks compounding value<br>across the platform<br><br><strong>What We're Looking For</strong><br><br>â 10+ Years of PM Experience: Proven track record in product management with significant<br>time spent in platform or infrastructure roles at high-growth SaaS or technology companies.<br>â Catalog Systems Expertise: Deep familiarity with how catalog and product information<br>systems work â including SKU management, variant modeling, pricing strategies, and multi-<br>channel distribution. Experience with multi-tenant or marketplace catalog infrastructure is a<br>strong advantage<br>â Platform &amp; API-First Thinking: Demonstrated ability to design products that serve as shared<br>infrastructure â defining APIs and data contracts with multiple downstream consumers in<br>mind and treating internal teams as first-class customers<br>â Data Modeling Intuition: Comfort reasoning about complex data models and understanding<br>the downstream implications of schema decisions on product behavior, performance, and<br>long-term extensibility<br>â Cross-Functional Influence: Ability to drive alignment across multiple product and<br>engineering teams without direct authority, and to balance competing requirements from<br>internal consumers using a clear, principled framework<br>â Bias for Ownership: Comfortable operating in ambiguous, high-stakes environments with the<br>confidence to define direction and drive execution independently, without waiting for problems<br>to be fully structured before acting<br><br><strong>What You'll Get</strong><br><br>â Platform-Level Impact: Opportunity to build the foundational infrastructure that powers<br>HighLevelâs entire commerce ecosystem. The decisions you make will shape the platform and<br>the merchant experience for years to come<br>â High Ownership Environment: Join a strong, already-assembled engineering and design<br>team with full autonomy over vision, roadmap, and execution for a mission-critical system at<br>the heart of our commerce strategy<br>â Scale: Influence how over a million businesses across 150+ countries create and manage<br>their product catalogs, and build the infrastructure that powers the next phase of HighLevelâs<br>commerce growth</p>\n<p></p><p><br></p><p></p>\n<p><strong>EEO Statement </strong>The company is an Equal Opportunity Employer. newContent: Remote OK Scrum Master Blackstone Talent Group <p><strong>Scrum Master (Contractor) â Job Description</strong></p><p><br></p><p>Position Details:</p><p><strong>Location:</strong> Dallas, Tx (Remote)</p><p><strong>Type</strong>: 6 Month Contract - NO C2C</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Responsibilities: </strong></p><ul><li>Support Agile delivery for assigned team(s) under guidance of the Senior Scrum Master Lead</li><li>Facilitate team-level Agile ceremonies (daily standups, spring planning, refinement, reviews, etc.)</li><li>Maintain team boards and delivery artifacts (e.g., Jira storyboards, sprint backlogs) ensuring work is current and accurately tracked</li><li>Assist with sprint forecasting, capacity planning and backlog readiness</li><li>Track and escalate impediments, risks, and dependencies to the Senior Scrum Master Lead, follow through on action items</li><li>Help monitor and report basic delivery metrics and support status updates</li><li>Promote Agile best practices and help the team adopt consistent working agreements and continuous improvement actions</li><li>Build working relationships with IT team members and business stakeholders</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Required Skills and Qualifications:</strong></p><ul><li>1-3 years of experience in an Agile delivery role</li><li>Working knowledge of Scrum fundamentals and Agile principles</li><li>Strong organization and attention to detail</li><li>Clear written and verbal communication skills; able to raise risks/issues early</li><li>Experience with Agile delivery tools such as<strong> Jira</strong>, Confluence, and ServiceNow</li><li>Scrum Master certification a plus</li></ul><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p>Blackstone Talent Group is a division of Blackstone Technology Group, a global IT services and solutions firm that implements technological solutions across commercial industry verticals and the US Federal Government. Blackstoneâs global talent augmentation practice was founded in 1998. Blackstone Talent Group has offices in San Francisco, Denver, Houston, Colorado Springs, and Washington, DC. HBO Max Where to Buy: $109.99 $78.99 at HBO Max (annual, basic) $184.99 $132.99 at HBO Max (annual, standard) $229.99 $164.99 at HBO Max (annual, premium) All three plans include access to HBO Max’s extensive library of movies and TV shows, including films from Warner Bros. Pictures, DC Studios, A24, Studio Ghibli, and Turner Classic Movies. Subscribers can also stream recent Oscar winners and nominees like titles like Sinners , One Battle After Another, and Marty Supreme , alongside other HBO Max originals. On the TV side, you’ll also get access to popular series like The Pitt , Hacks , Euphoria , and Heated Rivalry , as well as longtime favorites such as Game of Thrones , Friends , and The Big Bang Theory .  The biggest differences come down to features. The ad-supported Basic plan lets you stream on up to two devices simultaneously, while the Standard plan lets you download up to 30 shows and movies for offline viewing. It also includes access to live sports from the likes of the MLB, U.S Soccer, college football, NHL, and more. oldContent: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Infiniti Group: Entry Level Junior Trader (Remote) Anywhere in the World London All Other Remote Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5607/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://infinitiownerclub.com/">https://infinitiownerclub.com/</a> </p> <p><strong>Application link</strong>:&nbsp;<a title="https://infinitiownerclub.com/work/weworkremotely" href="https://infinitiownerclub.com/work/weworkremotely">https://infinitiownerclub.com/work/weworkremotely</a><br><br></p> <div class="vacancy-intro reveal reveal-delay-2 is-visible"> <p>Infiniti Group operates at the crossroads of digital assets, analytical market research, and algorithm-informed trading methods. We are dedicated to building a team of motivated beginners who want hands-on exposure to financial markets and real trading situations.</p> <p>We are looking for a&nbsp;<strong>Junior Crypto Trader</strong>&nbsp;— a role designed for those at the very start of their professional journey. If you're interested in reading market trends, executing trades, and working with data to inform your decisions, this is a great fit.</p> <p>You will trade independently but with structured oversight and regular feedback from experienced traders. There are no strict performance targets. Our focus is on developing your practical trading abilities in live crypto markets. No previous work experience is needed — we provide complete training.</p> </div> <div class="vacancy-block reveal reveal-delay-3 is-visible"> <h3>Key Responsibilities</h3> <ul> <li>Place buy and sell orders in cryptocurrency markets while following risk rules and basic strategies.</li> <li>Watch real-time price changes, trading volumes, and order book movements.</li> <li>Use charts, technical indicators, and market signals to guide trade entries and exits.</li> <li>Keep track of active positions and assess potential gains or losses.</li> <li>Follow crypto news and understand how events may affect prices.</li> <li>Work with industry-standard trading interfaces and analytics dashboards.</li> <li>Review your own trading results regularly to identify strengths and areas to improve.</li> <li>Build a deeper understanding of market behavior and trading techniques over time.</li> </ul> </div> <div class="vacancy-block reveal reveal-delay-4 is-visible"> <h3>What We Offer</h3> <ul> <li>A chance to grow inside an international company with a global outlook.</li> <li>100% remote work — you can operate from any location.</li> <li>Flexible hours and adjustable workload.</li> <li>Access to professional-grade trading tools and live market data.</li> <li>Use of advanced analytics and reporting systems.</li> <li>A clear roadmap for professional growth with increasing responsibility over time.</li> <li>Ongoing help and feedback from seasoned market practitioners.</li> <li>Hands-on training on professional trading platforms, guided by experienced mentors.</li> </ul> </div> <div class="vacancy-block reveal reveal-delay-5 is-visible"> <h3>Requirements</h3> <ul> <li>Basic computer literacy (using browsers, platforms, hotkeys).</li> <li>Stable internet connection and a laptop or PC.</li> <li>English at intermediate level or higher (to understand news and interface).</li> <li>Ability to focus during market hours (flexible, but attentive).</li> <li>Willingness to learn and ask questions.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Application link</strong>:&nbsp;<a title="https://infinitiownerclub.com/work/weworkremotely" href="https://infinitiownerclub.com/work/weworkremotely">https://infinitiownerclub.com/work/weworkremotely</a></p> </div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/infiniti-group-entry-level-junior-trader-remote">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/infiniti-group-entry-level-junior-trader-remote</a></p> Fri, 19 Jun 2026 09:48:50 +0000 Sun, 19 Jul 2026 09:48:50 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/infiniti-group-entry-level-junior-trader-remote https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/infiniti-group-entry-level-junior-trader-remote Bottle Nexus: Affiliate & Brand Account Manager Anywhere in the World Customer Support Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5605/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Santee, California, United States <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://bottlenexus.com">http://bottlenexus.com</a> </p> <p>Bottle Nexus is quickly becoming one of the most important technology platforms in alcohol e-commerce.</p> <p>We power compliant direct-to-consumer sales, fulfillment, affiliate programs, marketplaces, and digital commerce solutions for alcohol brands across the United States. oldContent: Remote OK Documentation Specialist Pinnacle Home Care Are you looking to make a difference in patientsâ lives with a company that values your expertise? Join us in our mission of delivering compassionate healthcare where it matters most ââ at home.<br><br>Pinnacle Home Care, Floridaâs largest independent Medicare-certified home health provider, has been delivering high-quality, patient-centered care for over two decades, and weâre looking for a Documentation Management Specialist to join our award-winning team.<br><br><strong>Key Responsibilities<br><br></strong><ul><li>Travel with CCs to referral partner offices and develop relationships with them, learn each accountâs referral patterns, and determine their preferred delivery method. Update and manage delivery methods in as necessary.</li><li>Travel regularly in the field to referral partner offices to obtain signatures for current or outstanding orders.</li><li>Work with referral partners to obtain outstanding paperwork when a CC is no longer working within the agency or at the branch.</li><li>Monitor to ensure the physician information is correct on the profile page, and research and correct any errors in that profile.</li><li>Submit Smartsheet for changes to CCâs assigned referral sources (MDâs, facilities/hospitals, etc.) or any other information that requires updates.</li><li>Document in daily the work performed to obtain current or outstanding orders by date, action, and follow-up date.
